blocks.text: Arsenal push for glory as Hovland hunts TPC Sawgrass title

Saturday delivers a stacked slate: three must-watch Premier League battles, Real Madrid and Atlético both in La Liga action, and Viktor Hovland riding strong early momentum into Round 3 at golf's fifth major.
⛳ THE PLAYERS Championship — Hovland in contention at TPC Sawgrass after a blistering start, chasing golf's biggest payday
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico — Leknessund and Wærenskjold launch Norway's spring classics campaign across Italian roads
